findings.text: NAP-SRC-0005 is a Guarantor Form from Edinburgh Napier University with student name Antal Elbushra, number 40805511, allocated accommodation G51 4JZ.
NAP-SRC-0007 is a payment confirmation email from Edinburgh Napier University (Ref: ENU447436) for a credit/debit card payment of £30.00.
No enhanced OCR engine is configured in available tools. Re-OCR cannot proceed without tool setup.
NAP-SRC-0005 extracted text contains garbled characters (e.g., 'BINDIN G', '~mount', 'Ha ca s tl law house') indicating poor OCR quality.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## OCR Improvement Report

### Source: NAP-SRC-0005 (PDF)
- Current extraction method: pdf_text (confidence 0.85)
- Issues: Garbled text (e.g., 'BINDIN G', '~mount', 'Ha ca s tl law house'), missing fields
- Recommendation: Re-extract with an enhanced OCR engine (e.g., Azure Document Intelligence, Google Document AI) to improve accuracy.

### Source: NAP-SRC-0007 (JPEG)
- Current extraction method: tesseract (confidence 0.65)
- Issues: Low confidence, possible misreads
- Recommendation: Re-OCR with an enhanced engine (e.g., Azure OCR, Google Cloud Vision) to improve readability.

### Tool Gap
- No enhanced OCR engine is currently configured in the available tools. A follow-up task is proposed to configure an enhanced OCR tool before re-extraction.
proposed_artifacts.title: OCR Improvement Report for NAP-SRC-0005 and NAP-SRC-0007

proposed_tasks.instructions: Configure an enhanced OCR engine (e.g., Azure Document Intelligence, Google Document AI, or Abbyy) in the Atticus tool registry. Once configured, re-run TASK-002 to re-OCR NAP-SRC-0005 and NAP-SRC-0007 with the new engine.
proposed_tasks.title: Configure enhanced OCR engine for re-extraction

redaction_flags.text: NAP-SRC-0007 contains a partially redacted card reference ('XXXXXXXXXXXX') and bank authorisation number; ensure redaction is complete.

risk_flags.text: NAP-SRC-0005 extracted text has significant OCR errors that may affect legal interpretation of the guarantor agreement.
NAP-SRC-0007 low OCR confidence may obscure payment details or reference numbers.
No enhanced OCR tool is available; re-OCR task cannot be executed without configuration.

summary: Task TASK-002 requires re-OCR of NAP-SRC-0005 (PDF) and NAP-SRC-0007 (JPEG) with an enhanced engine. The existing extraction for NAP-SRC-0005 (pdf_text, confidence 0.85) shows garbled text (e.g., 'BINDIN G', '~mount') and missing fields. NAP-SRC-0007 (tesseract, confidence 0.65) has low confidence and possible OCR errors. No enhanced OCR engine is configured in the available tools. A drafting note flags the tool gap and proposes a follow-up task to configure an enhanced OCR tool before re-extraction.

uncertainties.text: The exact student number in NAP-SRC-0005 is unclear due to OCR corruption ('408: .055 11.').
The accommodation address in NAP-SRC-0005 is partially unreadable ('Student Ha ca s tl law house').
NAP-SRC-0007 OCR confidence is low (0.65); some characters may be misread.
